name: Netex Knowledge Factory, S.A.
summary: Netex Knowledge Factory S.A. develops applications and service-based-solutions to deliver digital learning in companies and academic institutions. The company's portfolio includes learningCloud, a personalized learning environment that facilitates video, gamification, online/offline mobile learning, micro learning, social learning, interoperability, and real-time conferencing features for the modern workforce in corporations; and smartED, a solution for publishing houses. Netex Knowledge Factory S.A. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in La Coru√É¬±a, Spain.
